briefdescription.para: Left edge reached.
Right edge reached.
Top edge reached.
Bottom edge reached.
Enumeration for the scroll edge.
Left over scrolled.
Right over scrolled.
Top over scrolled.
Bottom over scrolled.
Enumeration for the over scrolled.
No search flags, this means a case sensitive, no wrap, forward only search.
Case insensitive search.
Search text only at the beginning of the words.
Treat capital letters in the middle of words as word start.
Search backwards.
If not present the search stops at the end of the document.
Show overlay.
Show indicator.
Show highlight.
Enumeration that provides the option to find text.
WebEngine callback related with page loading.
WebView callback related with page loading error.
WebView callback related with scroll edge reached.
WebView callback related with over scrolled.
WebView callback related with page url changed.
WebView callback related with screen captured.

WebView callback related with geolocation permission. Host and protocol of security origin will be provided when requesting geolocation permission. It returns true if a pop-up is created successfully, false otherwise.
WebView callback related with video playing.
WebView callback related with console message logged.
WebView callback related with certificate changed.
WebView callback related with http authentication.
WebView callback related with context menu shown.
WebView callback related with context menu hidden.
Message result callback when JavaScript is executed with a message.
Message result callback when JavaScript is executed with message name and body.
Alert callback when JavaScript alert is called with a message. It returns true if a pop-up is created successfully, false otherwise.
Confirm callback when JavaScript confirm is called with a message. It returns true if a pop-up is created successfully, false otherwise.

Prompt callback when JavaScript prompt is called with a message and an optional value that is the default value for the input field. It returns true if a pop-up is created successfully, false otherwise.
WebView callback related with form repost decision.
WebView callback related with frame rendered.
WebView callback related with response policy would be decided.
WebView callback related with navigation policy would be decided.
WebView callback related with new window policy would be decided.
WebView callback related with a new window would be created.
Hit test callback called after hit test is created asynchronously.
WebView callback called after fullscreen is entered.
WebView callback called after fullscreen is exited.
WebView callback called after text is found.
The callback to be called when the web engine received a plain text of current web page.
WebView callback informs browser app to display QB code popup for passkey scenario.
WebView callback informs browser app that the passkey registration and authentication has been successful and app can close QR popup.
The callback to be called when file chooser is requested.
The callback to be called when web process crashes.
The callback to be called when the web engine received a user media permission reqeust from user application.
The callback to be called when the web engine received a device connection changed event.
The callback to be called when the web engine received a device list.
Constructor.
Destructor.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t width, uint32_t height, const std::string &locale, const std::string &timezoneId)=0
memberdef.name: Create

briefdescription.para: Create WebEngine instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t width, uint32_t height, uint32_t argc, char **argv)=0
memberdef.name: Create

briefdescription.para: Create WebEngine instance.

parameterdescription.para: The string array of application arguments

briefdescription.para: Destroy WebEngine instance.
Check if WebEngine is in incognito mode.
Get settings of WebEngine.
Get back-forward list of WebEngine.
Load a web page based on a given URL.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the resource to load

briefdescription.para: Return the title of the Web.
Return the Favicon of the Web.
Get image to render.
Change orientation.
Return the URL of the Web.
Load a given string as web contents.

parameterdescription.para: The string to use as the contents of the web page

briefdescription.para: Load the specified html string as the content of the view overriding current history entry.

parameterdescription.para: Base URL used for relative paths to external objects
URL that could not be reached

simplesect.para: true if successfully loaded, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const int8_t *contents, uint32_t contentSize, const std::string &mimeType, const std::string &encoding, const std::string &baseUri)=0
memberdef.name: LoadContents

briefdescription.para: Request loading the given contents by MIME type into the view object.

parameterdescription.para: The type of contents, if 0 is given "text/html" is assumed
The encoding for contents, if 0 is given "UTF-8" is assumed
The base URI to use for relative resources

simplesect.para: true if successfully request, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Reload the Web.
Reload the current page's document without cache.
Stop loading web contents on the current page.
Suspend the operation associated with the view.
Resume the operation associated with the view object after calling Suspend().
To suspend all url loading.
To resume new url network loading.
Add custom header.

parameterdescription.para: custom header name to add the custom header
custom header value to add the custom header

briefdescription.para: Remove custom header.

parameterdescription.para: custom header name to remove the custom header

briefdescription.para: Start the inspector server.
Stop the inspector server.
Scroll web page of view by deltaX and deltaY.
Scroll edge of view by deltaX and deltaY.
Scroll to the specified position of the given view.
Get the current scroll position of the given view.
Get the possible scroll size of the given view.
Get the last known content's size.
Return whether forward is possible.

simplesect.para: True if forward is possible, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Go to forward.
Return whether backward is possible.

simplesect.para: True if backward is possible, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Go to back.
Evaluate JavaScript code represented as a string.

parameterdescription.para: The callback function to be called by the JavaScript runtime. This carries evaluation result.

briefdescription.para: Add a message handler into JavaScript.
Add a message handler into JavaScript.
Register a callback for JavaScript alert.
Reply for JavaScript alert.
Register a callback for JavaScript confirm.
Reply for JavaScript confirm.
Register a callback for JavaScript prompt.
Reply for JavaScript prompt.
Create a new hit test.

memberdef.argsstring: (int32_t x, int32_t y, Dali::WebEngineHitTest::HitTestMode mode, WebEngineHitTestCreatedCallback callback)=0
memberdef.name: CreateHitTestAsynchronously

briefdescription.para: create a hit test asynchronously.
Clear the history of Web.
Clear all tiles resources of Web.
Get user agent string.

simplesect.para: The string value of user agent

briefdescription.para: Set user agent string.

parameterdescription.para: The string value of user agent

briefdescription.para: Set size of Web Page.
Set background color of web page.
Clear tiles when hidden.

parameterdescription.para: Whether tiles are cleared or not

briefdescription.para: Set multiplier of cover area of tile.
Enable cursor by client.

parameterdescription.para: Whether cursor is enabled or not

briefdescription.para: Get the selected text.
Send Touch Events.
Send Key Events.
Support mouse events or not.
Support key events or not.
Set focus.

parameterdescription.para: True if focus is gained, false lost.

briefdescription.para: Set the style of IME.
Set the theme name of cursor.

parameterdescription.para: The name of theme of cursor.

briefdescription.para: Set zoom factor of the current page.

parameterdescription.para: a new factor to be set.

briefdescription.para: Query the current zoom factor of the page。
Set the current text zoom level。.

parameterdescription.para: a new factor to be set.

briefdescription.para: Get the current text zoom level.
Get the current load progress of the page.

simplesect.para: The load progress of the page.

briefdescription.para: Scale the current page, centered at the given point.

parameterdescription.para: a new factor to be scaled.

briefdescription.para: Get the current scale factor of the page.
Request to activate/deactivate the accessibility usage set by web app.
Get the accessibility address (bus and path) for embedding.

simplesect.para: Accessibility address of the root web content element.

briefdescription.para: Request to set the current page's visibility.
Search and highlight the given string in the document.

parameterdescription.para: The maximum match count to find

simplesect.para: true if found & highlighted, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Add dynamic certificate path.
Get snapshot of the specified viewArea of page.

memberdef.argsstring: (Dali::Rect< int32_t > viewArea, float scaleFactor, ScreenshotCapturedCallback callback)=0
memberdef.name: GetScreenshotAsynchronously

briefdescription.para: Request to get snapshot of the specified viewArea of page asynchronously.

simplesect.para: true if requested successfully, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Asynchronously request to check if there is a video playing in the given view.

parameterdescription.para: The callback called after checking if video is playing or not

simplesect.para: true if requested successfully, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Set callback which will be called upon geolocation permission request.

parameterdescription.para: The callback for requesting geolocation permission

briefdescription.para: Update display area.

parameterdescription.para: The display area need be updated.

briefdescription.para: Enable video hole.
Send Hover Events.

parameterdescription.para: The hover event would be sent.

briefdescription.para: Send Wheel Events.

parameterdescription.para: The wheel event would be sent.

briefdescription.para: Exit fullscreen.
Callback to be called when frame would be rendered.
Callback to be called when page loading is started.
Callback to be called when page loading is in progress.
Callback to be called when page loading is finished.
Callback to be called when an error occurs in page loading.
Callback to be called when scroll edge is reached.
Callback to be called when over scrolled.
Callback to be called when url is changed.
Callback to be called when form repost decision is requested.
Callback to be called when console message will be logged.
Callback to be called when response policy would be decided.
Callback to be called when navigation policy would be decided.
Callback to be called when new window policy would be decided.
Callback to be called when a new window would be created.
Callback to be called when certificate need be confirmed.
Callback to be called when ssl certificate is changed.
Callback to be called when http authentication need be confirmed.
Callback to be called when context menu would be shown.
Callback to be called when context menu would be hidden.
Callback to be called when fullscreen would be entered.
Callback to be called when fullscreen would be exited.
Callback to be called when text would be found.
Get a plain text of current web page asynchronously.
Cancel WebAuthentication(cancel in progress passkey operation).
Register WebAuthDisplayQR callback.

parameterdescription.para: The callback informs browser app to display QR code popup for passkey scenario.

briefdescription.para: Register WebAuthResponse callback.

parameterdescription.para: The callback informs browser app that the passkey registration and authentication has been successful and app can close QR popup.

briefdescription.para: Register FileChooserRequest callback.

parameterdescription.para: The callback to be called when file chooser is requested.

briefdescription.para: Register a callback for monitoring web process crash events in Web Engine.

parameterdescription.para: The callback function called when web process crashes.

briefdescription.para: Register UserMediaPermissionRequest callback.

parameterdescription.para: The callback to be called for handling user media permission.

briefdescription.para: Callback to be called when device connection changed.
Callback to be called to get device list.

memberdef.argsstring: (bool yDirection, int step, int x, int y)=0
memberdef.name: FeedMouseWheel

briefdescription.para: Feed mouse wheel event forcefully.
Enable video hole for a specific window type.

parameterdescription.para: True if wayland window, false if EFL window.

briefdescription.para: WebEnginePlugin is an abstract interface, used by dali-adaptor to access WebEngine plugin. A concrete implementation must be created for each platform and provided as dynamic library.
